summary: Field Trust UI integration on Profile page testing complete. Backend: 11/11 tests PASSED. Frontend: All data-testids verified. Trust UI block renders correctly with Hebrew RTL, value bar (green), risk bar (red), trust state label, and tooltip.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend field_trust integration CORRECT: _get_field_trust() retrieves value_score, risk_score, trust_score from user_state collection
Frontend FieldTrustBlock component CORRECT: Renders value bar (green #22c55e), risk bar (#ef444480), trust state with Hebrew labels
Tooltip text CORRECT: 'אמון שדה משקף את הערך שנצבר ביחס לדפוסי הסיכון לאורך זמן.'
All existing profile elements preserved: identity, stats strip, direction distribution, opposition axes, influence chain, action record, AI interpretation
Design is calm, non-gamified, non-punitive as required
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Field Trust UI integration complete. Profile page now shows: (1) Field Trust block with value/risk bars and trust state label, (2) Tooltip with Hebrew explanation text. Trust score ~17 shows 'יציב' (Stable) state correctly. All previous profile elements still working.

TestProfileFieldTrust.test_profile_record_includes_field_trust: PASS - field_trust object present with value/risk/trust scores
TestProfileFieldTrust.test_field_trust_matches_trust_endpoint: PASS - Values match GET /api/user/{user_id}/trust within tolerance

field_trust_block_tests.data-testid='field-trust-value': PASS - Shows value score 21 with green bar
field_trust_block_tests.data-testid='field-trust-risk': PASS - Shows risk score 4.3 with red bar
field_trust_block_tests.data-testid='field-trust-tooltip': PASS - Tooltip shows correct Hebrew text on click

field_trust_ui_details.tooltip_text: אמון שדה משקף את הערך שנצבר ביחס לדפוסי הסיכון לאורך זמן.
field_trust_ui_details.design_notes: Calm, non-gamified, quiet field indicator as specified

mocked_apis.note: Real backend APIs and Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI interpretation
